svg.text: Emergency scan runs BEFORE sign-in — no delay for critical cases. Anonymous log saved for audit
Two-stage emergency: (1) first message scanned immediately, (2) history + symptoms can also escalate to 999
Urgent cases: if no priority slot available, escalates to live receptionist via Copilot Studio handoff
All branches: triage data pre-fills SOAP (S) for consultation. Complete record saved to Dataverse
AgentCare — Workflow 1: Patient Triage & Consultation Preparation
